name: Chickpeas Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chick peas, cooked or 3 cans, drained
1 lb fresh spinach, rinsed and torn in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the chopped onion, minced garlic, sliced carrots, bouillon, and harissa to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and let simmer until the vegetables are softened, about 20 minutes.
3. Add the cooked chick peas, chopped cilantro, and spinach.
4. Simmer until the spinach is wilted.
5. Serve over brown rice or couscous. Each diner can stir in a little more harissa to suit their own taste.
6. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
